mnemonics.title: Network Topology Characteristics
mnemonics.content: BDRC - Bandwidth, Diameter, Routing complexity, Cost - Key factors to evaluate any network topology

mnemonics.title: Hypercube Dimension
mnemonics.content: HD = log₂N - Hypercube Dimension equals log base 2 of number of nodes

mnemonics.title: MIN Stages
mnemonics.content: S = log₂N - Multistage Interconnection Network Stages equal log base 2 of number of inputs
